ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant (e.g., city, region) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "lat_long" TEXT /* Latitude and longitude of the restaurant */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the restaurant's page on the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant type */,
  "price_range_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price range */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities (e.g., Wi-Fi, outdoor seating) */,
  "menu_link" TEXT /* Link to the restaurant's menu */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant listing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant listing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_price_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_range_id") REFERENCES price_ranges ("price_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES restaurant_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., city, region) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restaurant type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cuisine was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cuisine was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_ranges" (
  "price_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price range */,
  "price_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the price range (e.g., 'Budget', 'Mid-range', 'Fine Dining') */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price for the price range */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price for the price range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price range was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_cuisines" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cuisine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id", "cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is anonymous */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is anonymous */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was left */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the administrator's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the administrator */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the admin account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the admin account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
